parts.text:
Run the attestation E2E test suite. This validates all agent modes, tool access, model routing, cache behavior, and punch card recording.

Steps:
1. cd to the daemon directory
2. Run: KILO_LIVE=1 npx vitest run tests/attestation-e2e.test.ts
3. Wait for all tests to complete
4. Report the full test output including pass/fail counts

Do NOT modify any code. Just run the test and report results verbatim.
